4-column master gene map: UMAP clusters + UMAP expression + Spatial clusters + Spatial expression

GenerateMasterGeneMaps.Rd

For each gene, generates one PDF with one row per spatial image, and four columns: UMAP colored by clusters, UMAP colored by gene expression, spatial plot colored by clusters, and spatial plot colored by gene expression. A single pair of legends (categorical + continuous) is attached to the right.

Usage

GenerateMasterGeneMaps(
  seurat_object,
  features,
  imgalpha = 1,
  alpha = 1,
  group.by = "seurat_clusters",
  images_to_plot = NULL,
  remove_outliers = FALSE,
  outlier_prob = 0.01,
  size_override = NULL,
  colors = NULL,
  gene_colors = c("#053061", "#2166AC", "#D1E5F0", "#FDDBC7", "#F4A582", "#D6604D",
    "#B2182B", "#67001F"),
  output_dir,
  object_name = "",
  cluster_col = NULL,
  cluster_colors = NULL
)

PlotMasterMaps(
  seurat_object,
  features,
  imgalpha = 1,
  alpha = 1,
  group.by = "seurat_clusters",
  images_to_plot = NULL,
  remove_outliers = FALSE,
  outlier_prob = 0.01,
  size_override = NULL,
  colors = NULL,
  gene_colors = c("#053061", "#2166AC", "#D1E5F0", "#FDDBC7", "#F4A582", "#D6604D",
    "#B2182B", "#67001F"),
  output_dir,
  object_name = "",
  cluster_col = NULL,
  cluster_colors = NULL
)

Arguments

seurat_object

A Seurat object with both "umap" reduction and spatial images.

features

Character vector of gene names.

imgalpha

Numeric. Tissue image transparency. Default 1.

alpha

Numeric. Spot transparency. Default 1.

group.by

Character (or vector). Metadata column(s) for cluster coloring. Default "seurat_clusters". When a vector is supplied, the function recurses and produces one PDF set per variable.

images_to_plot

Character vector or NULL. Images to include.

remove_outliers

Logical. Default FALSE.

outlier_prob

Numeric. Default 0.01.

size_override

Scalar or named numeric list. A plain number applies to all images; a named list applies per image.

colors

Named character vector. Colors for group.by levels. NULL auto-resolves from PrepObject or Nour_pal.

gene_colors

Character vector. Gradient for gene expression.

output_dir

Character. Output directory for PDFs.

object_name

Character. Label for PDF filenames. Default "".

cluster_col

Deprecated alias for group.by.

cluster_colors

Deprecated alias for colors.

Value

NULL invisibly (always writes to disk).

Details

Accepts a vector for group.by: one PDF set is produced per variable.

Functions

  • PlotMasterMaps(): Preferred short alias.

On this page
